name: Involuntary Conversion Gain Deferral

eligibility.description: Must purchase replacement property within 2 years (3 years for condemned real business/investment property; 4 years for principal residences in disaster areas).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Defer gain from property destroyed, stolen, seized, or condemned by reinvesting insurance or condemnation proceeds into similar or related-use property.
